programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E12 The Car is Mine!
programme.desc: A man locks himself in a trunk after deputies respond to a restraining order call. Deputies respond to two women arguing over the ownership of a car. A driver comes clean to a deputy during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E34 Fast Pase Foot Chase
programme.desc: A high speed vehicular pursuit results in foot chase and subsequent arrest. Officers respond to a domestic call involving the residence’s girlfriend and her children who destroyed the man’s house. Police respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E10 Table for Two
programme.desc: Police respond to an emergency call and find a man in dire trouble. Deputies respond to an abusive husband at a local eatery. Two women try to buy narcotics from an undercover deputy during a sting.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E14 Dishonest Dudes
programme.desc: A couple attempts to give the cops the slip during a storm. A motorist tries to resist deputies, but his moves are outdated. Police encounter a suspiciously sweaty man on an eerily dim street.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E01 Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: An armed trespasser uses a young dog as a shield. A woman under the influence goes on a rampage, tearing into homes and people. A cat lady calls the cops when her neighbors get nosy.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E06 Life Changing Moment
programme.desc: An officer attempts to pull over a man on a bicycle who refuses to stop. An officer arrests two suspects involved in a drug deal who attempt to discard the evidence. An officer questions a driver leaving a known drug area.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E07 No Money, More Problems
programme.desc: A woman hides in her apartment after she skips out on paying her cab fare. A knife fight results in multiple calls to the police for help. A French tourist get a bus ride from Hell in Florida.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E19 You Didn't Get Very Far
programme.desc: A husky cyclist takes a spill when he tries to flee. Officers chase a suspect in a stolen car who says he was just fixing it for a friend. A man's denials of drug use lose credibility when cops find a meth pipe in his vehicle

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E17 Facebook Fury
programme.desc: A DUI suspect reminds an officer of one famous dude. A naked man shocks a stranger on her porch. A daughter’s tantrum shakes the whole apartment when mom takes away Facebook.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E35 Down-home Dog
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation. An elderly man is questioned after reportedly kicking a juvenile in the face. A man is shot in the head by his roommate.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E03 Red Cycle, Red Cycle
programme.desc: A search of a suspicious pedestrian turns into a foot chase. A suspect riding a red motorcycle refuses to surrender to police. A driver’s poor response time attracts attention.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E02 Dine and Flee
programme.desc: A sting operation is set up to catch narcotics dealers. A man flees a restaurant without paying his four-hundred-dollar tab. A traffic stop for a tint violation leads to a felony arrest for narcotics.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E14 Release & Catch
programme.desc: An officer pulls over an erratic driver while on the way to a shots fired call. An officer attempts to stop a resistant motorcyclist. Officers respond to a domestic violence call involving an intoxicated man and a woman with warrants.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E04 You've Got Mail
programme.desc: During a routine traffice stop, an officer witnesses a cyclist get hit by a motorist. An officer investigates a domestic disturbance call involving some spousal infidelity. Authorities respond to a tip regarding a heavy weight drug dealer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E09 Peace Keeper
programme.desc: The Organized Crime Unit places officers undercover as drug dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. An Officer responds to a domestic dispute call after a man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. During a routine patrol, an Officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E04 Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A man behind the wheel of a stolen vehicle leads deputies on a wild pursuit. When a man threatens his brother with a knife, Mom calls the cops. A young couple tell deputies conflicting stories.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E05 Put Your Clothes Back On
programme.desc: Cops try desperately to get an unclothed man to cooperate. After a chase with a pickup truck, officers find a 14-year-old in the driver’s seat. On a routine traffic stop, police contend with a plethora of dope and even more lies.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E15 All The World's Our Bedroom
programme.desc: Officers are called to remove a man sleeping in a parking spot at Wal-Mart. A free-spirited couple takes their relationship to their front lawn. A resident brings a knife to a meeting with his building property manager.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E35 My BFF Screwed Up
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a woman holding a loaded gun to her head. Officers kick in a door to halt an assault in progress. A woman driving a stolen vehicle claims it was purchased by a friend.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E05 That’s My Grill
programme.desc: A teen makes a run for it after being turned over to medics. During a traffic stop, a suspect does his best to keep his lips sealed. An angry aunt can’t evict her nephew and his pregnant girlfriend.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E14 My Mom's Car
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. A Florida man driving a stolen vehicle claims it belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E14 Fast Food Escape
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E22 Petrol Heist
programme.desc: Officers wrestle an uncooperative driver to the ground after a traffic stop. Deputies search for a man who sent threatening texts to his ex-girlfriend. Two suspects are caught stealing gas.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E08 Car Thief
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle pursuit ends in a take down and recovery of additional evidence. A store employee flags down an officer who steps in to make a theft related arrest. An officer is accompanied by several units in pursuit of a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: AnimaCars Discovery
programme.desc: Poznaj Jonny'ego Toolboxa i AnimaCars i dołącz do ich licznych misji ratunkowych, aby przywrócić spokój w Animatown!

programme.title: Carl the Super Truck
programme.desc: Carl Super Truck i jego transformacje na ratunek! Gdy Samochodzikowo potrzebuje pomocy, ten superbohater wkracza do akcji.

programme.title: Construction Squad
programme.desc: Zespół budowlany buduje Samochodzikowo cegła po cegle! Pokazują, że wszystko jest możliwe z pomocą naszych przyjaciół.

programme.title: Learning with AnimaCars
programme.desc: Odkryjmy liczby, litery, kolory i kształty poprzez zabawne i ekscytujące zadania na świeżym powietrzu z załogą AnimaCars!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Poznaj Monster Trucks, ciężko pracujące samochody, które łączą siły, aby pomóc przyjaciołom i mieszkańcom Monster City.

programme.title: Super Truck
programme.desc: Carl Super Truck i jego gadżety na ratunek! Gdy mieszkańcy Car City potrzebują pomocy, ten superbohater wkracza do akcji.

programme.title: Ted the Train
programme.desc: Wszyscy na pokład ekspresu edukacyjnego! Ted to pociąg, który uczy dzieci o kolorach, zwierzętach, owocach, warzywach i nie tylko.

programme.title: Tom the Tow Truck
programme.desc: Poznaj Toma, wynalazcę z Samochodzikowa! W swoim nowoczesnym laboratorium tworzy wynalazki, aby rozwiązać problemy przyjaciół.

programme.title: Tom's Paint Shop
programme.desc: Zatrzymaj się w warsztacie Toma Holownika! Ten kreatywny malarz z radością ulepszy i nada swoim przyjaciołom nowy, świeży wygląd.

programme.desc: Starting in 1985, these are the power ladies who really rock! Expect Pink, Hayley Williams, Joan Jett, Sheryl Crow, Bonnie Tyler, Alanis Morissette & many more!

programme.title: Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.desc: A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.title: Linkin Park: Fan Favourites
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Linkin Park: Fan Favourites

programme.title: 50 Reasons The 10s Rocked!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 50 Reasons The 10s Rocked!
programme.desc: 50 anthems of rock from the 2010s! With the 1975, Wolf Alice, Linkin Park, Royal Blood, Paramore, Biffy Clyro, YUNGBLUD & much more!

programme.title: The Anthems!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: All Killer: 00s No.1s!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 All Killer: 00s No.1s!
programme.desc: In order, an hour of every song a number 1 rock song in the noughties!

programme.title: Dumbass Anthems: 2000-2007
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Dumbass Anthems: 2000-2007
programme.desc: 25 All-Killer 00s Dumbass Anthems! From Blink-182 and Wheatus to Fall Out Boy and Scouting For Girls.

programme.title: The Anthems!

programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Claire Sturgess Alt Rock Heroes!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Claire Sturgess Alt Rock Heroes!
programme.desc: Claire has 30 of her best alternative rock bands & artists who side-stepped classic rock to include influences from Punk, Funk, Goth, Indie & even Hip Hop!

programme.title: Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.desc: A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.title: Backtrack: Rock No.1s 2015-1980
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Backtrack: Rock No.1s 2015-1980
programme.desc: In reverse: Starting in 2015, we're going back 35 rock years of number 1 hit singles & albums!

programme.title: Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.desc: A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.title: Turn Up The 00s Anthems!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Turn Up The 00s Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn up your spreakers to 11 and live life even louder! 50 All-Killer Anthems in order from Blink 182 in 2000 to The Killers at the end of the Decade!

programme.title: College Campus Rocks! 1995-2010
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 College Campus Rocks! 1995-2010
programme.desc: These rebellious teens rocked every college campus throughout the 90s and 00s. Expect great tunes from Blink-182, Wheatus, Good Charlotte and many more!

programme.title: Kings & Queens: 2000 - NOW!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Kings & Queens: 2000 - NOW!
programme.desc: Starting in the 00s, bow before the royal rock stage! Home to the best front men and leading ladies that the world of rock has produced!

programme.title: Linkin Park: Fan Favourites
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Linkin Park: Fan Favourites
programme.desc: Starting in 2001, here are the biggest rock songs from Linkin Park!

programme.title: Love Bites! With Nicky Horne
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Love Bites! With Nicky Horne
programme.desc: Nicky brings a masterclass in the most popular (& dangerous) subject in rock history! 20 songs loaded with lust, desire, breakups & despair - this is how love really does bite!

programme.title: Blazing Rock Ballads!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Blazing Rock Ballads!
programme.desc: The Biggest Ballads from the royals of rock! From Queen, Bon Jovi & Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, Nickleback & Evanescence.

programme.title: Muse: Fan Favourites
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Muse: Fan Favourites
programme.desc: From 2003 to 2015 - 30 minutes of the biggest rock songs from Muse!

programme.title: Rated Rock! The No.1s
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Rated Rock! The No.1s
programme.desc: Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!

programme.title: Claire Sturgess Alt Rock Heroes!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Claire Sturgess Alt Rock Heroes!
programme.desc: Claire has 30 of her best alternative rock bands & artists who side-stepped classic rock to include influences from Punk, Funk, Goth, Indie & even Hip Hop!

programme.title: The Anthems!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Teenage Dirtbags! 1995-2010
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Teenage Dirtbags! 1995-2010
programme.desc: From the rebellious teens of the 90s and 00s we bring you the stars who said "To hell with the world" and expressed themselves through great tunes!

programme.title: Alex Baker's 30 High School Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Alex Baker's 30 High School Heroes
programme.desc: Dust off your old posters as Alex relives 30 era-defining mega bangers that made high school legendary! Featuring Evanescence, No Doubt, Limp Bizkit, Wheatus & many more!

programme.title: Weekend Anthems!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Weekend Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Monsters of Rock! 1990-1999
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Monsters of Rock! 1990-1999
programme.desc: A definitive 6 hour marathon of 90s guitar anthems! From U2 to INXS, Blur to Bon Jovi, Skunk Anansie to Green Day, Metallica to Iron Maiden - 70 rock classics are here, in order!

programme.title: 80s Movie Madness Day!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 80s Movie Madness Day!
programme.desc: Popcorn at the ready - it's a whole day of music from the movies!

programme.title: Soundtrack Smashes: 1985
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Soundtrack Smashes: 1985
programme.desc: Can you believe that 1985 delivered so many huge movie hits? Top songs from The Breakfast Club, Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome, Desperately Seeking Susan, Back To The Future and more!

programme.title: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun! 1980-89
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Girls Just Wanna Have Fun! 1980-89
programme.desc: NOW 80s rolls out 5 hours of the fiercest females! From Cyndi & Madonna to Whitney, Bananarama & Kylie, it’s wall-to-wall singalongs & unapologetic 80s fabulousness!

programme.title: The NOW 100 of the 80s!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The NOW 100 of the 80s!
programme.desc: Mark Goodier with a definitive countdown of the 100 biggest acts of the 80s - compiled using record sales, concert tickets, awards & more - from the UK, the USA & around the world!

programme.title: 1988 Unleashed!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 1988 Unleashed!
programme.desc: Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights & iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1988!

programme.title: ALMOST Top of the Pops! 1988
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 ALMOST Top of the Pops! 1988
programme.desc: 25 (mostly) great songs that all hit the top 3 in 1988, but didn't quite reach the summit. Including Bros, Billy Ocean, Inxs, Danny Wilson & Anfield FC!

programme.title: Wot? They Streamed a Billion?
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Wot? They Streamed a Billion?
programme.desc: What 80s songs have streamed over a billion times worldwide in the decades since? There are lots from Queen, Guns n Roses, Bon Jovi & AC/DC, but the top 3 might surprise you!

programme.title: Spring Has Sprung!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Spring Has Sprung!
programme.desc: The feelgood pop decade just got even better with the end of winter and the advent of Spring! Bring it on - 80s style!

programme.title: Make Mine A Double with Pat Sharp!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Make Mine A Double with Pat Sharp!
programme.desc: They says 2 heads are better than one & in the 80s the charts were full of collaborations. So pour a large one & have double the fun with Pat Sharp's top 40 duets.

programme.title: 40 Hits ... That Missed!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 40 Hits ... That Missed!
programme.desc: Not only did they miss the top 10, but these 40 famous songs never even scraped the UK top 20 first time around! From Abba to Aerosmith & Janet Jackson to Joan Armatrading.

programme.title: Clare Grogan's Tartan Top 30
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Clare Grogan's Tartan Top 30
programme.desc: In the 80s the Scottish scene was vibrant & creative with punk, indie, synth, acoustic & Celtic folk influences topping the charts. Altered Images' Clare Grogan has 30 of the best.

programme.title: 1981 Unleashed!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 1981 Unleashed!
programme.desc: Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights & iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1981!

programme.title: ALMOST Top of the Pops! 1981
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 ALMOST Top of the Pops! 1981
programme.desc: 20 (mostly) great songs that all hit the top 3 in 1980, but didn't quite reach the summit. Including Godley & Creme, Phil Collins, Laurie Anderson, Kim Wilde & Abba.

programme.title: 1981 Unleashed!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 1981 Unleashed!
programme.desc: Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights & iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1981!

programme.title: WOW Was THIS Their Biggest Seller?
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 WOW Was THIS Their Biggest Seller?
programme.desc: Shocks galore over the next two hours, as we reveal the often-surprising 80s songs that sold the most singles for top stars including Elton John, Madness, ELO, Depeche Mode & more!

programme.title: Mark Goodier's US No.1s! 1980-1989
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Mark Goodier's US No.1s! 1980-1989
programme.desc: A 10 hour marathon - in order - 120 US chart toppers, most of which never made it anywhere near the top in the UK! From KC & The Sunshine Band in 1980 to Billy Joel in 1989.

programme.title: Manic Ritual
programme.desc: Lose yourself in the flickering shadows of distortion. A hypnotic sequence of sonic violence and dark imagery designed to unsettle the soul. Bow to the heavy. Welcome to the Manic Ritual.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Recorded live in Hamburg, this 2007 concert features a high-voltage mix of new material and legendary classics. Experience the enduring power of a hard rock institution with over 30 years of history on the stage.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Discover the explosive origins of the San Francisco thrash scene. From garage rehearsals to the first club riots, see how bands like Metallica and Exodus ignited a global movement. It’s the raw, untold story of metal's birth.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers II
programme.desc: The saga continues as the Bay Area sound conquers the world. Witness the evolution from underground heroes to global icons through exclusive interviews and rare footage. Experience the peak of the thrash metal revolution

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Found your new baseline. Rock Bottom digs deep into the rawest hard rock and alt-anthems. We’re hitting the floor with heavy riffs and soulful grit—no shovels required, just volume. This is the foundation of everything that kicks.

programme.title: Manic Ritual
programme.desc: Lose yourself in the flickering shadows of distortion. A hypnotic sequence of sonic violence and dark imagery designed to unsettle the soul. Bow to the heavy. Welcome to the Manic Ritual.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 South Korea + Spain
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne is always looking for the best food in the world to share. The first stop is South Korea with her Sesame Crusted Tuna 'Yukhoe', a delicious blend of favourite Korean flavours. Next stamp on the passport? Spain! Mouth-watering Duck Breast is seared and served rare with a crispy artichoke heart, membrillo, olives, and sweet-savoury sherry reduction. Beef short ribs are the common ingredient with Catalonian Braised and Romesco to one side and sticky Korean Kalbi-style grilled to the east! For the topper, drool over Bulgogi Octopus simmered and served with saffron-scented Sticky Rice Paella cakes, finished with crispy Paprika-Gochujang battered mussel....

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Ethiopia + Brazil
programme.desc: Travel the world without ever leaving the kitchen! Intrepid host of CombiNATION Plates, Bianca Osbourne, starts this episode with Ethiopian inspired Berbere Spiced Quail, seared in aromatic Niter Kibbeh, and served with crunchy-sour Gomen Salad. Brazil is next, check out this re- invention of Feijoada... with braised and seared pork belly, oranges, crema, and fresh black bean salsa. Common ingredient 'Coffee and Sweets' is next... with java-spiked Injera Crepe Cake for Ethiopia and Brazil blending up a dark roast of rich, coffee-spiked, chocolatey Brigadeiros truffles. The final plate is Coconut Crusted Black Cod with cheesy Brazilian-style Pao de Queijo bites, and teff flour a brush of...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Morocco + Thailand
programme.desc: Join CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne for a trip to Morocco and Thailand! First up, whole Red Snapper is rubbed with earthy Ras el Hanout spice, poached in argan oil, and served with char-grilled oranges. Thailand inspires the next plate; Chicken Thigh 'Lollipop', roasted and served with bamboo shoots, chilies, and sauced with peanut-coconut red curry. Next, these countries both love Spring Rolls... Morocco's version, Briouat, is stuffed with saffron couscous and fresh cheese and fried... from Thailand comes a salad roll with shrimp and mango, dipped in a fiery green Nam Jim. Stick around for the big dish - Saffron buttERS-basted beef Striploin, served with complex Apricot-Green...

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Sweetest
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our sweetest dessert recipes, from hosts like Siobhan Detkavich and Jessica McGovern.

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Feed a Crowd
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most popular recipes for feeding a crowd, from hosts like Kyle Crawford and Vanessa Gianfrancesco.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 $25 Feasts: Budget Meals
programme.desc: A modest budget inspires bold ideas as just twenty five dollars stretches into satisfying, flavor-packed griddle meals. Simple ingredients are transformed with imagination and skill, proving that good food doesn’t have to come with a high price tag.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Hibachi at Home
programme.desc: The rich heritage of hibachi meets modern griddle artistry. Dive into the origins of teppan-style cooking while exploring new sauces, sizzling techniques, and flavor-packed innovations that bring restaurant-style magic to the home griddle.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Breakfast of Champions
programme.desc: Morning meals take center stage as griddles bring new energy to breakfast classics. Pancakes, bacon, and hash browns transform with bold ideas from home kitchens, turning the first meal of the day into something truly special.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E21 Addictive Argentinian food
programme.desc: Argentinian-born chef Natalia Machado makes grilled calamari salad, followed by grilled pizza, and then shows us how to make lamb ravioli, before finishing it off with the best-ever cookies: alfajores.

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Cake & Loaf Gatherings
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Cake & Loaf Gatherings by Nickey Miller & Josie Rudderham! Follow along as Shahir bakes delicious carrot whoopie pies, bacon butter tarts, chocolate mini cheesecakes, and much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Baking Wisdom
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Anna Olson’s Baking Wisdom! Follow along as Shahir makes a breakfast galette, a classic apple tart, a rich brown butter pecan pie, and much more!

programme.title: BLITZ!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 More Vanessa Gianfrancesco
programme.desc: BLITZ! is an all-new cooking show! Imagine being next to Vanessa Gianfrancesco as they cook their fav dishes!

programme.title: BLITZ!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 More Eva Chin
programme.desc: BLITZ! is an all-new cooking show! Imagine being next to Eva Chin as they cook their fav dishes!

programme.title: Griddle Nation

programme.desc: A modest budget inspires bold ideas as just twenty five dollars stretches into satisfying, flavor-packed griddle meals. Simple ingredients are transformed with imagination and skill, proving that good food doesn’t have to come with a high price tag.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Hibachi at Home
programme.desc: The rich heritage of hibachi meets modern griddle artistry. Dive into the origins of teppan-style cooking while exploring new sauces, sizzling techniques, and flavor-packed innovations that bring restaurant-style magic to the home griddle.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Breakfast of Champions
programme.desc: Morning meals take center stage as griddles bring new energy to breakfast classics. Pancakes, bacon, and hash browns transform with bold ideas from home kitchens, turning the first meal of the day into something truly special.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 DIY Weddings
programme.desc: Warm host Jessica McGovern offers up some do-it-yourself recipes that will spice up any wedding.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 DIY your Indian Food
programme.desc: Cheerful host Vijaya Selvaraju shows us how to DIY some of the important staples of Indian cuisine.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Easy Weeknight Recipes for Busy Days
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks her way from Monday to Friday with four delicious dishes, including a Roast Beef feast and velvety Earl Grey Pudding.

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Paella
programme.desc: In this episode of Up the Dish, steal away to Spain for a summer vacation as host Tiera Singh takes a swing at Paella, complete with sunny saffron, saucy sofrito, and super crunchy soccarat. Next, Missy Hui takes a break for brunch with Chorizo Eggs Benedict - the Saffron Hollandaise is good as gold and twice as bright! Poppy Sandler follows with her Fritto Misto and Sofrito, a delicate and fresh veggie fry-up that soaks up a tomato-spiked sofrito dipping sauce. Micah Trainor finishes up with restaurant-ready Razor Clams steamed in sparkling Spanish wine, served alongside nutty Iberico Ham and sweet Manchego cheese.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Shrimp and Sausage
programme.desc: It's all about the letter "S" as Chef Robert Jewell cooks up tasty meals using shrimp and sausage. For his first recipe, Robert fries up turmeric-spiced sweet potato fritters with a shrimp centre. He takes this tantalizing appetizer to another level with a savoury lime soy dipping sauce. Next up, Robert makes an English breakfast strata. This sausage casserole is easily the BEST way to start your day. He layers the bottom of the dish with buttered sourdough slices, before adding crispy fried sausages, leeks and tomatoes. He then covers it in a creamy egg mixture, crumbles stilton on top and bakes it to golden brown. Finally, Robert combines shrimp and sausage into one flavourful dish.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Versatile Miso
programme.desc: Miso is an extremely common ingredient in Japanese cuisine. Host Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen shows us how miso can add flavour and richness to any dish.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Meatballs and Shakshuka
programme.desc: A Moroccan meal in 30 minutes? That's right! Spencer Watts inspires with Moroccan dishes that are quick to make and bold in flavour.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Italy + China
programme.desc: Join engaging host, Bianca Osbourne, for a taste of two countries. First stop? Italy! Check out her recipe for succulent wild boar ribs, braised until tender, rolled in gremolata, and served over silky polenta. Next up? A culinary tribute to China, pairing lobster claw with chili oil, pomelo foam, and oyster sauce glazed bok choy. Every episode features a 'common ingredient', this time? It's noodles! Drool over two recipes: Italian classic Olio e Aglio next to chewy Chinese long Noodles tossed with Sichuan Chili Oil. For the big finale, Bianca blends Italian style with Chinese flavour for a one-of-a-kind CombiNation Plate: Kung Pao Pork Osso Bucco over Forbidden Black Rice Risotto... made...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Turkey + Indonesia
programme.desc: Turkey, think Silk Road spices. Indonesia, lots of seafood and tropical fruits! Curious and adventurous host Bianca Osbourne is your CombiNATION Plates culinary guide through both food cultures. First, check out Turkish Spice Crusted Lamb Rack with yogurt and blistered peppers. Next, an Indonesian tribute: Crab Leg with Coconut Curry. For the 'common ingredient'? Two takes on tender, savoury eggplant! Turkish Eggplant is braised and served with parsley and feta and the Indonesian take is served with fried garlic and sweet soy. For the CombiNATION Plate? Peanut- chili Sate sauce replaces walnut for Pazili TrancÌ§a, a classically Turkish halibut presentation, also served here with unique,...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Canada + Greece
programme.desc: From Canada to Greece, CombiNATION Plates always covers lots of ground! Kicking off, host Bianca Osbourne wows with ubERS-Canadian Roasted Venison Loin, yummy Fiddlehead Pancakes and sweet-tart Cranberry sauce. Next, enjoy a scenic Mediterranean vacation on a plate with her completely new approach to Greek Salad, taken up a notch or two with tasty seared Albacore Tuna! This episode's 'common ingredient' is lamb shank; check out two wildly creative re- inventions; first, of Canadian TourtieÌ€re, and then, Greek Dolmades. For a final recipe, a dessert fit for a lumberjack or a Greek god! Oka Saganaki with McIntosh Apple Butter and Maple Loukoumades; made with nutty Canadian Oka cheese,...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Mexico + Norway
programme.desc: In this episode of CombiNATION Plates, host Bianca Osbourne starts in Mexico with her version of popular street snack, 'Esquites', re-invented here as sweet corn flan. Next is Norway, don't miss explosively exciting quick-smoked Arctic Char with Forage, you've NEVER seen anything like this before. The common ingredient is tacos! From Norway, 'Lefse' is a potato-flour 'tortilla' served with fresh berries and uniquely Scandinavian 'Brunost' cheese. Representing Mexico, check out spicy pork and pineapple 'Tacos al Pastor'. The Big Dish is Lamb Pinnekjott with Birch Bark Tamale, lamb ribs are seasoned, birch bark is stuffed with masa and veggies, both are steamed over birch branches and boozy...

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 A Barbeque Classic: Ribs
programme.desc: Grill master Spencer Watts shows us four ways to barbeque a classic. Succulent, tender, mouth-watering ribs.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 East Coast Vibes
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an East Coast-inspired meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: clam chowder, shrimp rolls, a simple salad, and blueberry cobbler!

programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a meal using leftovers for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: panzanella salad, stuffed peppers, cheese fondue, and chocolate banana crostini!

programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Picnic
programme.desc: Picnics are fun, elegant, and filled with delicious food! Host Jessica McGovern shows us some of her favourite picnic-ready desserts.

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Sunshine and Showers
programme.desc: An ode to Sunshine and Showers, this delectable Flour Power spring themed special inspires with three deliciously creative desserts. Charming host Jessica McGovern shows that spring showers bring decadent treats such as toasted hazelnut Mud Puddle Cookies and adorable Flower Pot Cupcakes that are sure to rejuvenate and bring new life to your kitchen!

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Coffee Klatch
programme.desc: Coffee klatch is an old-fashioned tradition of gathering with your friends for coffee and conversation. In this sweet half-hour special, charming host Jessica McGovern pays tribute to this custom with three decadent and impressive desserts made with fragrant coffee

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Birds and Bees
programme.desc: Bring the sunshine to your kitchen with Flour Power's sweet half-hour spring special Birds and Bees! Inspired by chirping birds and buzzing bees, charming host Jessica McGovern bakes adorable desserts, including sweet and salty Bird's Nest Cookies and an ovERS-the-top Honey Apricot Dessert Tower drizzled in sticky goodness.

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Kids' Bake Sale
programme.desc: Lace up your aprons and have the darling children join in on the fun as bubbly host Jessica McGovern inspires with creative and delicious Kid's Bake Sale recipes. Irresistible and easy-to-make, Jessica guides us through four baked goods that will sell faster than it'll take to make.

programme.desc: Lazy and curmudgeonly chef and ex-Gusto writer Zach cooks one of his all-time favorite dishes – Spaghetti and Meatballs! While cooking, he tells aimless stories, cracks bad jokes, and berates Sydney, the beleaguered camera person.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Sprouts, Veggies and Potatoes

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Georgia + Hong Kong
programme.desc: Join Bianca Osbourne to taste and combine! Fun CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne starts this episode with an inspired tribute to Georgian cuisine; Beef Tartare with Tkemali (sour plum sauce), marigold powder, and tart, crunchy pickles. Next; feast your eyes on her unique Hong Kong dumpling: plump scallops, pork, and veggies are blended, rolled, steamed, sliced, and then served with Crispy Yu Choy and XO. The common ingredient is rabbit! Georgia offers up Rabbit 'Mtsvadi', grilled and glazed with pomegranate reduction. Hong Kong represents with Sweet and Sour Rabbit, Grilled Pineapple and Red Pepper Coulis. Finally, Georgian Milk Braised meets Chinese/Hong Kong-style Roast Duck with...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 South Korea + Spain
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne is always looking for the best food in the world to share. The first stop is South Korea with her Sesame Crusted Tuna 'Yukhoe', a delicious blend of favourite Korean flavours. Next stamp on the passport? Spain! Mouth-watering Duck Breast is seared and served rare with a crispy artichoke heart, membrillo, olives, and sweet-savoury sherry reduction. Beef short ribs are the common ingredient with Catalonian Braised and Romesco to one side and sticky Korean Kalbi-style grilled to the east! For the topper, drool over Bulgogi Octopus simmered and served with saffron-scented Sticky Rice Paella cakes, finished with crispy Paprika-Gochujang battered mussel....

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Ethiopia + Brazil
programme.desc: Travel the world without ever leaving the kitchen! Intrepid host of CombiNATION Plates, Bianca Osbourne, starts this episode with Ethiopian inspired Berbere Spiced Quail, seared in aromatic Niter Kibbeh, and served with crunchy-sour Gomen Salad. Brazil is next, check out this re- invention of Feijoada... with braised and seared pork belly, oranges, crema, and fresh black bean salsa. Common ingredient 'Coffee and Sweets' is next... with java-spiked Injera Crepe Cake for Ethiopia and Brazil blending up a dark roast of rich, coffee-spiked, chocolatey Brigadeiros truffles. The final plate is Coconut Crusted Black Cod with cheesy Brazilian-style Pao de Queijo bites, and teff flour a brush of...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Morocco + Thailand
programme.desc: Join CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne for a trip to Morocco and Thailand! First up, whole Red Snapper is rubbed with earthy Ras el Hanout spice, poached in argan oil, and served with char-grilled oranges. Thailand inspires the next plate; Chicken Thigh 'Lollipop', roasted and served with bamboo shoots, chilies, and sauced with peanut-coconut red curry. Next, these countries both love Spring Rolls... Morocco's version, Briouat, is stuffed with saffron couscous and fresh cheese and fried... from Thailand comes a salad roll with shrimp and mango, dipped in a fiery green Nam Jim. Stick around for the big dish - Saffron buttERS-basted beef Striploin, served with complex Apricot-Green...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Italy + China
programme.desc: Join engaging host, Bianca Osbourne, for a taste of two countries. First stop? Italy! Check out her recipe for succulent wild boar ribs, braised until tender, rolled in gremolata, and served over silky polenta. Next up? A culinary tribute to China, pairing lobster claw with chili oil, pomelo foam, and oyster sauce glazed bok choy. Every episode features a 'common ingredient', this time? It's noodles! Drool over two recipes: Italian classic Olio e Aglio next to chewy Chinese long Noodles tossed with Sichuan Chili Oil. For the big finale, Bianca blends Italian style with Chinese flavour for a one-of-a-kind CombiNation Plate: Kung Pao Pork Osso Bucco over Forbidden Black Rice Risotto... made...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Turkey + Indonesia
programme.desc: Turkey, think Silk Road spices. Indonesia, lots of seafood and tropical fruits! Curious and adventurous host Bianca Osbourne is your CombiNATION Plates culinary guide through both food cultures. First, check out Turkish Spice Crusted Lamb Rack with yogurt and blistered peppers. Next, an Indonesian tribute: Crab Leg with Coconut Curry. For the 'common ingredient'? Two takes on tender, savoury eggplant! Turkish Eggplant is braised and served with parsley and feta and the Indonesian take is served with fried garlic and sweet soy. For the CombiNATION Plate? Peanut- chili Sate sauce replaces walnut for Pazili TrancÌ§a, a classically Turkish halibut presentation, also served here with unique,...

programme.title: Global Street Eats

programme.title: Global Street Eats

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot faces a unique challenge in Clane, Co. Kildare.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon helps Senator Katherine Zappone and Dr Ann Louise Gilligan renovate a dilapidated hunting lodge in Brittas, Dublin.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Desperate for more space, a couple with two young daughters, who have long since outgrown their tiny cottage in Killawalla outside Westport, engage Dermot to help.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: New Yorker Ursula and accountant Jimmy from Ennis enlist Dermot's help with their colossal house in Firhouse, Dublin

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Clare Heenan and Rory Kelly live in a compact 1950's bungalow in the south Dublin suburb of Stillorgan. Long time renters, the couple struggled for years to afford this house. It's their first home but with a series of small, disjointed rooms and a damp, grotty extension - it's far from ideal...

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the ten years since they first met Avril and Andrew Wilson-Rankin have been dreaming of owning their own home. Now they've bought a property in Dun Laoghaire south county Dublin but it's as far from being a home, or even a house, as you could imagine.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jean Robinson and Daithi Elliffe have bought themselves what they hope will be an ideal family home in a unique location - a listed 19th century former schoolhouse at Kilternan with spectacular views of the Dublin mountains, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Struggling with a tight schedule, a limited budget and the traditionalist taste of his clients, can Dermot balance their love of classic farmhouse design with his own vision of clean urban functionality?

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week, Dermot wants to create a wheelchair friendly house in Malahide that's also a welcoming family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Sally-Ann, her husband Trevor, and their four children live in Sally-Ann's childhood home - a huge, distinctive 1970s architect-designed home outside Mullingar in Westmeath that they've dreamed of rennovating for years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Since they married two years ago, Paul and Sabina Horgan have become the proud parents of baby Mia and the owners of a property on the North Dublin coast: Lismara - a dilapidated 1940s cottage in Portmarnock in an extremely poor condition.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: GP, writer and budding musician Dr Pat Harrold, his wife Marita, a physiotherapist, and their four kids returned to Pat's home town of Nenagh 10 years ago and they have been looking for a place to call home ever since.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Leonard and Caroline live in house once owned by Leonard's grandparents in the south Dublin suburb of Dundrum - a 1960s three-bed semi that hasn't changed at all since the couple bought it two years ago.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At the village of Puckaun in north Tipperary, teachers Darragh Egan, his partner Sarah Lovett and their three month old son Donagh are moving home. What could be simpler or more straightforward? Well, as it turns out, quite a lot. Home is the 1960s bungalow where Darragh grew up - built on the site of the old village school by his late father Jim and currently occupied by his 70 year old mother.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Airline pilot Ian Callaghan has bought a 1930s Victorian house in his hometown of Drogheda, County Louth, which he and his girlfriend Claire Moore are keen to call home. Though full of charm and period features, the house is in dire need of renovation. Enter: architect Dermot Bannon with an innovative plan to retain the building's century-old ambience while adding a radical modern extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Last year, Aoife from Sutton and her wife Mel from New Zealand bought themselves a three bed semi in Baldoyle north Dublin - a tiny house in a spectacular bayside location. With incredible, unobstructed views of the sea and Portmarnock golf course, they've been hoping to renovate the house to suit its superb location ever since.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot is in Maynooth. Seven years ago, George and Sinead Mullis fell in love in with the Coach house - an 1850s building on half an acre of the historic former Carton Estate in Maynooth. In 2014, they bought the place for just half of its former asking price and moved in with their two year old son Daniel. But what seemed like their dream home soon turned out to be anything but.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: A special edition of the show where Dermot revisits three of his favourite builds from earlier series: the Longford publicans he convinced the embrace the void, a couple moving home from California to Bishopstown and 14 year old Michael's wheelchair accessible semi-d in Malahide.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Robbie and Julie from Darndale in North Dublin have saved for over 20 years to buy the house of their dreams - a 1940s cottage in the picturesque north Dublin suburb of Malahide. With a budget of 180K, Dermot's clients plan to gut the cottage, doubling its size with a spacious new two-storey extension to the rear, but the remediation costs are high.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Farmer and Boatbuilder Enda and his wife Mags live on a 55 acre Brussel Sprout farm at Balheary near Swords in North Dublin. After three decades of life in the country, they're moving back to Enda's home town - the picturesque seaside village of Rush. Their new home, formerly owned by Enda's aunt is an old fisherman's house near the harbour.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Moate in County Westmeath, is a place where football is part sport, part religion. On an overgrown plot on the outskirts of town lies the abandoned future home of county GAA All Star Dessie Dolan, his wife Kelly and their 3-year-old son Nathan. They have bought themselves a dilapidated cottage on a hopelessly exposed site in the village.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At Sutton in North Dublin, Dermot extends a 1960s suburban house, changing a beloved childhood home into a sumptuous new one for Hannah, James and their twin sons. To give the couple the 'wow factor' they've asked for, Dermot designs a large L-shaped extension at the rear of the house with a soaring mezzanine level.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Having rented a house in Navan for the last two years, teacher Celine and sound engineer Dave are excited at the prospect of moving to a farmhouse once owned by her grandparents at Kildalkey village in County Meath where Celine grew up. The couple will be the fourth generation to live there and retaining the charm and character of the old place is a major concern for the whole family.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the three years since newlyweds Rosie and Keith bought their five-bed house in Templeogue, Dublin 6, they haven't changed a thing. From the dark, cold interiors to the cavity block, flat roofed extension, this house is a relic of 1970s design, with décor to match. Keen to create a unique take on the rather unimaginative suburban semi, Dermot designs a radical, steep-roofed extension...

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Country and Irish legend Daniel O'Donnell and his wife Majella share a large four bed detached home in Kincasslagh West Donegal. Unlike Daniel, who's fairly happy with the place, Majella is keen to upgrade and reconfigure the interior. With her husband on tour, she's determined to get the very best from her architect.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Nine years ago, Susie and Dave bought their dream home on the outskirts of Fermoy in Cork - a 170 year old three storey mansion that Susie has admired since she was a teenager. The house however, has begun to show its age and Susie and Dave want to extend and upgrade to create the ultimate family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: IT manager Christine has bought herself a red brick terraced house in Clontarf, North Dublin. Christine has big plans for the place but as Dermot quickly discovers, they're far bigger than her 130K budget will allow. And despite his best efforts, Dermot is unable to convince Christine to modify her 25 page wish list.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At the seaside village of Portrane in North Dublin, Dermot creates a workable home for three generations of the one family under the watchful, budget-conscious eyes of two sisters.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Recently returned to Ireland after 12 years in London, new parents website designer Cliona and IT manager Micheal have already spent 30 grand renovating a 1950s semi-D at Killester in North Dublin in their own distinctive, industrial style.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dairy farmer Padraig and schoolteacher Katie are hoping to create their 'forever' home by renovating a century-old farmhouse on a half acre of land recently inherited from Padraig's uncle. But delivering this dream won't be easy for their architect. Dermot's problems begin when he presents his initial design and it Katie announces that she has no time for 'open plan' living.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At a 1960s 'Semi D' in Stillorgan, Dermot's vision of a million euro 'Malibu style' house for Rory and Lorna from the west of Ireland descends into an ongoing battle over the style and position of the front door.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: David and Nessa Conlon have just bought this 1990s split level detached bungalow and plan to move in with their three children (twin boys aged 11 and a 7 year old girl) once the renovations have been completed.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the second episode of Room To Improve, Dermot Bannon heads to Borrisoleigh, Co. Tipperary, to meet Joe Kenny and his bride to be Mary Hayes. Joe's house is a 3 bedroom, 2 storey house on a half acre site about half a mile from Borrisoleigh, with beautiful views of green fields. Mary and Joe are creating their dream home, to move into just after their wedding. Joe has lived the bachelor life up until now and his house reflects this. Dermot can see exactly why Mary is insisting on a redesign.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the third episode of Room To Improve, Dermot Bannon heads to Rathfarnham, where Yvonne and Adrian Saunders live with their daughter Lauren. Yvonne and Adrian's house is a detached 1950s two-bedroom property, in need of massive transformation. Dermot likens it to a 'Hansel and Gretel' house.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In Ashford Co. Wicklow stands the house of Nigel and Frances Coffey. Frances's parents live next door. Several years ago her father built a private road and gave seven plots of land to his seven children.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Claudia and Tom bought this 1920s bungalow with panoramic views of Tramore Bay in 2012 for 305K. Just back from living abroad (Spain, Dubai and Germany) they have been living in the house for the past year.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Glenn Keating and Gustav van der Westhuizen live in Grace Park, Drumcondra, with their 5-year-old son Noah and two pet Weimaraner dogs. They live in an Edwardian terraced three story house. The terrace was originally built for officers of the British Army, between 1897 and 1902. Glenn is a youth worker for LGBTI+ young people in the city centre and Gustav is a banker.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot had a journey to go on with this build with Lisa and Marc.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Laura's expectations from Dermot were high but to get the build to the construction stage was tricky due to the tight budget.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Paul and Hilary really want to modernise the house that was built originally in the 1970s but they have to be clever with their budget.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot has a challenge, as he has to work within a tight budget of 210k and has a lot to do for what Jim and Mary want.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Conor and Amy are a young couple who have made the decision to put down roots together by renovating an old farmhouse.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot revealed a plan that would facilitate the old abode to be renovated plus he added a rear extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Carmel and Hugh wanted a home which was going to be manageable for them both going into their later years in life.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The Gray family have been living in the house for seventeen years, but they wanted to future proof it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Gráinne Murphy and Ivan Williams have been dreaming about renovating Ivan's forefather's old farmhouse for many years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Brian Carrigg and Kate Molony attempt to renovate a bungalow with a view of the Rock of Cashel that Kate has dreamed of owning all her life.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Sandra and Daniel Davey bought their dream home in Knocklyon, Dublin over four years ago.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Ann Brannigan and her husband David are attempting to give Ann's former family home in Santry, Dublin a complete renovation.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Eimear Farrell, a single mum and her 8-year-old daughter Hannah with a budget of 20,000 euros (our smallest budget in the series) need the entire downstairs of the 2 bedroomed home in Ballybrack completely re-modelled.

programme.title: Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.desc: As it turns out, the only predictable thing about this build are delays caused by Dermot's obsessive attention to detail.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot is in Glasnevin with Terry and Peadar Clarke and their two children Marie Bernadette and Luke.

programme.title: Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.desc: Dermot's vision for the house is mirrored by similarly grandiose ambitions for the garden - a wild jungle whose design he hands over to landscaper Diarmuid Gavin.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon faces a tough challenge in meeting the design brief and budgetary restraints for the Zambra family who are building an extension in Castleknock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week, Dermot Bannon helps a couple in Enniscorthy renovate an old cottage and prepare their home for a new baby.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In this week's programme, the penultimate of the series, Dermot finds himself the dream job.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week, Podge and Jo Ussher want to turn their Wexford cottage from a holiday home into their permanent home without sacrificing any of its 1930s charm.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: They bought their home at the end of the property boom and now it's worth less than they paid for it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Timahoe, Portlaoise with Dolores and Donal O'Connell. Their five children are all grown-up but still live in the area.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Cathy and Michael Keane bought their house when it was being used as a cowshed. They converted it, had four children and over the years Dad, Michael, has added on bits to it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Declan and Judy Cadwell from Clontarf share a small terraced home with their three sons, Christopher 19, Ross 17 and Jake 13. But only just.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Marie Duffy moved into her Victorian townhouse off the South Circular Road four years ago. Her friends all thought she was mad to buy it because there was so much work to be done.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot encounters a stumbling block or two when he turns his hand to a badly laid out bungalow in Co Offaly.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot revamps a Rathfarnham four-bed to suit the changing needs of its occupants Peter, Lisa and their twins Grace and Louise (9) live in a four-bed house in Rathfarnham, Dublin 14.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: A young couple with three children seek Dermot's help in revamping their small three bedroomed bungalow in Ballinteer Ailish and Patrick Bates are a young couple running out of space - fast!

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot knows exactly how to solve the problem but it means destroying a lot of the work the couple have already done.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts are up against the clock to revamp their 70s bungalow in Enniskerry before their first baby arrives.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot needs to create "a bungalow downstairs" incorporating a bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, living and dining room.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is normally confident about presenting a plan. But with a couple as design-literate as Greg and Siobhan, the stakes are that bit higher.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Rathcoole with Mary Moore, the design solution Dermot offers Mary is one of the most unusual and interesting he has ever conceived.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon sets out to transform people's living spaces. Before moving in to their 1940s ex-council house in Co Kilkenny, the Kirwans added a basic extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot wants to turn the house completely on its head, putting the bedrooms to the front and extending the back to include a kitchen, living and dining that leads into the garden.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Templetuohy, Co. Tipperary with Joanne and Sean Cleere who believe they need a substantial extension but Dermot doesn't actually concur.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Room to Improve starts with Margaret and Jodie Burke who plan to renovate the family home in Foxrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Pádraig Whooley and Lorraine Dufficey spent 265 thousand euros on their remote cottage at Rossmore in West Cork, they knew that - while the hilltop location was ideal - the house was far from it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Laytown, co.Meath, with a budget of 60,000 euros, Dermot's worry "is even if you took away the shoddy workmanship you'd spend the 60k, this is a really difficult one..."

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Dalkey, with a budget of 180,000 euros, he must come up with an innovative design to match their exacting requirements within the confines of an incredibly tight site.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Clontarf, with Denise and Ben who desperately want a second bathroom for their family home, but their budget is limited.

programme.title: Nature's Beauty: World of Relaxation
programme.desc: Scenes from over 100 different exotic, natural destinations around the world; a seamless, graciously flowing mix of several Nature Relaxation shorter length productions, designed to keep you in a state of complete relaxation from start to finish; transitioning you from golden sunsets to snowy mountaintops; from hidden canyon waterfalls to tropical islands so pure you've likely never seen anything like it!

programme.title: Date With Nature
programme.desc: Photographers capture the serenity of a lakeside paradise, navigating the shores, revealing the secrets of aquatic life and how the light shines upon the water's surface.

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: Filmed in 2013 by David Huting, the tiny island is hidden off of the northeastern coast of the outer Fiji Islands (near Taveuni), and boasts a perfect white sandy beach, groves of palm trees, and a majestic lagoon that shelters the island from all sides. It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.title: Yellow Wildflowers: France

programme.title: Tiny House by the Coast: Îles de la Madeleine

programme.title: Glacial Beauty: Newfoundland

programme.title: Dolphin Voyage Relaxation

programme.title: A Day on the Napali Coast

programme.desc: A big palm tree facing a white sandy beach, glistening blue sea, sunshine, and a small boat; filmed in 4K Ultra High Definition on the hidden island of Nanuku, where a small atoll is surrounded by an untouched lagoon, miles away from it all.

programme.desc: Take a trip through the Indonesian jungle to a remote waterfall cascading over a natural cave.
